page_content:
EDCP663 Rehabilitation and Treatment of Mental and Emotional Disorders (3 Credits)

Purpose and principles of rehabilitation and treatment methods of adolescents and adults with significant mental health disorders and dual diagnoses. Focus is on the individual as well as the family. The course includes information regarding etiology, assessment, treatment interventions, program planning, and program evaluation. Prerequisite: EDCP610; or permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.
